features: 🎅🎅Package contents：the package comes with 4 pieces of Xmas ugly sweater theme party bags in 4 styles, each style has 1 pieces,Nice Christmas theme party decorations will be a hit for a gift bag to your kids. Throw an amazing Christmas party.
